description: Product Description This casual belt is an ideal men's accessory for daily wearing, complementing uniforms, jeans, formal attire, and everyday clothing for formal or informal occasions. EVERYDAY DRESS BELT This mens belt is suitable for daily wear, it's multiple used for work and outdoor activities, can be matched with work suits and casual wear. It measures 35mm in width, making it the perfect size for dressing up or dressing down. The metal buckle completes the look, adding a touch of sophistication and style to every outfit.
